title: BREAKING: US Government BANNED Mythos and Fable
summary: The US government issued an export control directive requiring Anthropic to disable Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for all customers immediately. The source frames this as a breaking news development affecting model availability.
writeup: This video reports a US government export control directive requiring Anthropic to immediately disable its Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for all customers. The framing is regulatory: access to the models is being restricted through government action rather than a company decision. The takeaway is that the two named models are being shut off across the customer base, with the directive citing export controls as the basis.
